query.help: Search for items on HideMe. Example: hide-me search query "my search term" --limit 20 --table hide-me search query "keyword" --filter "price:lt:100" hide-me search query "keyword" --properties "title,price"
query.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me search query` when you need to search for items on hideme. example: hide-me search query "my search term" --limit 20 --table hide-me search query "keyword" --filter "price:lt:100" hide-me search query "keyword" --properties "title,price". Key options: --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --table/-t, --properties/-p.

item.help: Get details for a specific item. Example: hide-me search item abc123 --table hide-me search item "https://example.com/item/abc123" hide-me search item abc123 --properties "title,price"
item.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me search item` when you need to get details for a specific item. example: hide-me search item abc123 --table hide-me search item "https://example.com/item/abc123" hide-me search item abc123 --properties "title,price". Key options: --table/-t, --properties/-p.

list.help: List items from HideMe. Example: hide-me search list --limit 100 --table hide-me search list --filter "status:active" hide-me search list --properties "id,name,status"
list.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me search list` when you need to list items from hideme. example: hide-me search list --limit 100 --table hide-me search list --filter "status:active" hide-me search list --properties "id,name,status". Key options: --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --table/-t, --properties/-p.

wildcard.help: Search items with wildcard pattern matching. Supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields. Browser CLIs use client-side search.
wildcard.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me search wildcard` when you need to search items with wildcard pattern matching. supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields. browser clis use client-side search. Key options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --fields, --properties/-p.

search.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me search` for search hide-me. Consult the leaf commands in this group for the exact action.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth login` when you need to configure authentication credentials. prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. for oauth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent. Key options: --profile/-p, --force/-F, --credential-type/-c.

logout.help: Clear stored credentials and browser sessions.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth logout` when you need to clear stored credentials and browser sessions. Key options: --profile/-p.

status.help: Check authentication status across profiles. Performs a live round-trip for every configured credential type so the report reflects ground truth — not on-disk belief. Saved credentials whose live verification fails are reported as ``authenticated: false`` with the failure reason in ``api_test`` (API/OAuth) or via the live browser check (browser_session).

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth status` when you need to check authentication status across profiles. performs a live round-trip for every configured credential type so the report reflects ground truth — not on-disk belief. saved credentials whose live verification fails are reported as ``authenticated: false`` with the failure reason in ``api_test`` (api/oauth) or via the live browser check (browser_session). Key options: --profile/-p, --table/-t.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth test` when you need to test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles. Key options: --table/-t, --verbose/-v, --profile/-p.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth profiles list` when you need to list all profiles and show which is the default. Key options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --properties/-p.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth profiles get` when you need to get details for a specific profile. Key options: --table/-t.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth profiles create` when you need to create a new profile from .env.example template.

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth profiles set-default` when you need to set a profile as the default (is_default_profile=1).

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth profiles delete` when you need to delete a profile and its data. Key options: --force/-F.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth profiles` for manage authentication profiles. Consult the leaf commands in this group for the exact action.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me auth` for manage hide-me authentication. Consult the leaf commands in this group for the exact action.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me cache clear` when you need to remove all cached responses. deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `hide-me cache` for manage response cache. Consult the leaf commands in this group for the exact action.

usage_instructions: Use `hide-me` when you need to work with cli interface for hideme (browser automation). Check the command groups below for the exact operation and required flags.
